adversarialValidation.approach: Reintroduced the swallowing pattern at synthesis.go line 152 (inner RunSynthesis call) and ran the structural regression test in isolation.
adversarialValidation.failureMessage: BUG-004-H1 regression: synthesis.go reintroduced silent query-error swallowing at line(s) 152 — replace `if err == nil { ... }` with `if err != nil { slog.Warn(...) } else { ... }` so subquery failures are observable
